overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a gothic horror action RPG. The player character, wearing a long coat, walks through a foggy Victorian-era urban environment at night, navigating through stone courtyards, ascending stairs, and approaching a building entrance. The atmosphere is dark and moody with gas lamp lighting and heavy fog.

events.description: warm firelight becomes visible through the archway ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered courtyard toward the distant fire glow

entered.detail: large stone archway forming the exit of the courtyard with decorative columns
thick stone column with decorative brick patterning
wet cobblestone ground with scattered autumn leaves
red brick wall with tall arched windows
wide stone staircase leading upward into the fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered stone courtyard with cobblestone ground and thick support columns. Warm firelight becomes visible through the archway ahead as the character approaches the exit of the covered area.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending to foggy upper level

events.description: character exits the covered courtyard and begins ascending the stone staircase
emerging into heavy fog with visibility significantly reduced

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs while the environment opens up to the foggy night air

entered.detail: black iron railing along the left side of the staircase
gas lamp glowing through the heavy fog
bare tree silhouetted against the foggy sky

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the covered courtyard and begins ascending a wide stone staircase with iron railings. As the character climbs, the environment opens up to heavy fog with street lamps and bare trees visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy upper street with historic buildings

events.description: character reaches the top of the stairs and turns left toward a building entrance
approaching a building with warm light and a red banner above the entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the foggy street toward a building entrance with a red banner

entered.detail: brick building with red vertical banner and warm interior lighting
doorway with stone steps and overhead lamp
black iron fence along the building perimeter

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the character turns left and walks along a foggy cobblestone street. The character approaches a historic brick building with a red banner above the entrance, passing under the glow of street lamps in the misty atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered stone courtyard into a wide, fog-shrouded Victorian street. It begins with the character walking across cobblestones beneath thick support columns, moving toward a warm glow of firelight visible through a distant archway. As the character exits the covered area, the scene opens up to a wide stone staircase with iron railings, where the lighting shifts to the dim radiance of street lamps filtering through heavy mist and bare trees. The camera then follows the character to the top of the stairs and turns left onto a foggy cobblestone road, finally approaching a historic brick building marked by a red banner above its entrance.
